ohtani.title: Freddie Freeman's two big hits power Dodgers to win
ohtani.blurb: Freddie Freeman hits two doubles, passing Carlos Beltrán on the all-time doubles list, to lead a dominant Dodgers' offense in a 12-3 win

imanaga.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong's cycle highlights walk-off win
imanaga.blurb: Pete Crow-Armstrong hits MLB's first cycle of 2026 and Matt Shaw walks it off in the Cubs' 5-4 win over the Rockies

suzuki.title: Dansby Swanson collects four RBIs in Cubs' 9-6 win
suzuki.blurb: Dansby Swanson, Carson Kelly and Pete Crow-Armstrong power the Cubs' 9-6 victory against the Mets

yoshida.title: Jake McCarthy walks it off in Rockies' 3-2 win
yoshida.blurb: Jake McCarthy leads the Rockies to a 3-2 win over the Red Sox with a walk-off triple

okamoto.title: Joey Loperfido's homer lifts Astros to win in extras
okamoto.blurb: Joey Loperfido's three-run homer in the 11th inning lifts the Astros to a 9-7 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Manny Machado walks it off in Padres' 7-6 win
matsui.blurb: Fernando Tatis Jr. hits a game-tying homer and Manny Machado hits a walk-off single in the Padres' 7-6 win over the Braves
